desc: Runs CreateMepFilterSet.ForProject for one or more service keys, then CreateMepFilterSet.ApplyToAllTemplates to add filters with coordinated overrides to plan templates.
summary: Runs CreateMepFilterSet.ForProject for one or more service keys, then CreateMepFilterSet.ApplyToAllTemplates to add filters with coordinated overrides to plan templates. Service keys default to a full MEP bundle when serviceTypes is omitted (drainage, mechanical, electrical, fire, plumbing).
postcondition: New filters may be created; plan templates may gain filters and overrides.

outputs.name: filterCount
outputs.description: Number of filter elements created or resolved in the batch

preprompts: Creating standard MEP filters for the project...
Detecting service scope from parameters or default bundle...
thinkingsteps: Parse serviceTypes as comma-separated keys; trim and deduplicate case-insensitively.
If serviceTypes is empty, use the default five-discipline bundle and wire recoverable guidance.
Call CreateMepFilterSet.ApplyToAllTemplates so plan templates receive filters and overrides.
Run inside one manual transaction; commit after both steps.
Return filter count and service list for orchestration feedback.
successprompts: Batch MEP filters created and applied ({filterCount} filters).
Finished creating filters and updating templates.
